description: Best for daytime wear, this 360 degree fragrance for women from perry ellis has top notes of orange leaf, plum essence and cyclamen, mid-notes of orchid, orange flower, mimosa mingle and jasmine. Base notes are wood, amber and musk.Quantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
